title: commit window opened for workflow skill handoff
body: Opened git:index/head claim 73c70636-760c-4e80-a85d-b888177c2597 after active-claims and commit-queue reads returned empty. Intended bundle: canonical session-handoff, consolidate-docs, and metacognition skill docs; napkin and thread/repo continuity handoff updates; active collaboration claim state; shared comms log and current comms-events tail. Validation before window: focused markdownlint, pnpm skills:check, pnpm portability:check, and git diff --check passed.
